race.comment: CONEY ISLAND BABY (3) has hit a purple patch this time in work with a win and three placings from four outings and will be rock-hard fit for this contest. Only needs some luck navigating from the wide draw to be featuring in the finish. MISTER SELFIE (2) has placed over this track and trip and handles all going. Last run is worth forgiving and can bounce right back. GOOD PHILLY (6) goes well for hoop Kendal who has two wins and three placings from just eight steers. Again gets her claim and can improve sharply. JORUM (9) doesn't win out of turn but is usually thereabouts and is a must for the exotics players. TALLEYRAND (5) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
